keywords: Slack team messaging chat workspace channels real-time notifications
description: Real-time team messaging platform with channels, DMs, and integrations
patterns: WebSocket per-client connection for message delivery
Kafka for message fan-out across workspace members
PostgreSQL for message history with cursor-based pagination
Redis pub/sub for presence and typing indicators
S3 for file attachments with pre-signed URLs
Push notifications via APNs/FCM for offline users
